<<<KOT:megapode>>>>
{"kind":"molecule","gloss":"a {urn:molecule-v0:bird|bird} [m] of one kind; it is big; it has two big parts for moving; when it makes something small from itself, it does not sit on it; instead, it puts it where there is heat from decaying things or from the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m]; the small thing becomes the bird from inside this heat; the young bird comes out of the small thing very ready to move and live","groundingRefs":["urn:molecule-v0:bird","urn:molecule-v0:sun"]}
<<<END:megapode>>>>

<<<KOT:miasmic>>>>
{"kind":"molecule","gloss":"like or filled with bad air or {urn:molecule-v0:smoke|smoke} [m]; something one can sense; it comes from places where many things are dying or decaying; bad for someone who feels it or breathes it","groundingRefs":["urn:molecule-v0:smoke"]}
<<<END:miasmic>>>>

<<<KOT:mitochondrion>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"a technical organellar and biochemical concept: its identity depends on ultrastructural membrane topology (double membrane, cristae), molecular machinery (respiratory chain complexes, ATP synthase, genetic material separate from nucleus), and aerobic metabolic function that cannot be expressed in the prime lexicon or grounded via the available catalog. It belongs to the cell-biology and biochemistry sector, not this tier"}
<<<END:mitochondrion>>>>
